parsers.description: Collecte les logs CloudTrail AWS (JSON). Normalise en OCSF classe 6001 (API Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# AWS CloudTrail — JSON logs (via S3/SQS or file)
# OCSF Class : 6001 (API Activity)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON) or File
# Tested with: CloudTrail JSON format, AWS
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.cloudtrail_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8516}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudtrail_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # CloudTrail JSON structure :
  # eventVersion, eventTime, eventSource, eventName, awsRegion,
  # sourceIPAddress, userAgent, userIdentity.{type, arn, accountId, userName},
  # requestParameters, responseElements, errorCode, errorMessage
  # to_string() sans `!` : retourne null sur champ absent au lieu de panic (events CloudTrail incomplets)
  event_name = to_string(.eventName) ?? ""
  event_source = to_string(.eventSource) ?? ""
  valid = event_name != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : ISO 8601
    ts_str = to_string(.eventTime) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Error = failure (exists() obligatoire car to_string(null) == "" en VRL)
    error_code = if exists(.errorCode) { to_string(.errorCode) ?? null } else { null }
    error_msg  = if exists(.errorMessage) { to_string(.errorMessage) ?? null } else { null }
    is_error = error_code != null

    ocsf_severity = if is_error { 3 } else { 1 }
    status = if is_error { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    status_id = if is_error { 2 } else { 1 }

    # User identity (peut manquer pour AWSService / AssumedRole partiel)
    user_identity = object(.userIdentity) ?? {}
    user_type = to_string(user_identity.type) ?? null
    user_arn = to_string(user_identity.arn) ?? null
    user_name = to_string(user_identity.userName) ?? null
    account_id = to_string(user_identity.accountId) ?? null

    # Service name from eventSource (e.g. "ec2.amazonaws.com" → "ec2")
    service_name = replace(event_source, r'\.amazonaws\.com$', "")

    .class_uid    = 6001
    .category_uid = 6
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts
    .status       = status
    .status_id    = status_id

    .api = {
      "operation": event_name,
      "service": {
        "name": service_name
      },
      "request": {
        "uid": to_string(.requestID) ?? null
      },
      "response": {
        "error":         error_code,
        "error_message": error_msg
      }
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name":       user_name,
        "uid":        user_arn,
        "account_uid": account_id,
        "type":       user_type
      }
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": to_string(.sourceIPAddress) ?? null
    }

    .http_request = {
      "user_agent": to_string(.userAgent) ?? null
    }

    .cloud = {
      "provider": "AWS",
      "region":   to_string(.awsRegion) ?? null,
      "account_uid": account_id
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "CloudTrail",
        "vendor_name": "AWS"
      },
      "version": to_string(.eventVersion) ?? null,
      "uid":     to_string(.eventID) ?? null
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "event_type":          to_string(.eventType) ?? null,
      "event_category":      to_string(.eventCategory) ?? null,
      "management_event":    .managementEvent,
      "read_only":           .readOnly,
      "recipient_account_id": to_string(.recipientAccountId) ?? null
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.eventVersion)
  del(.eventTime)
  del(.eventSource)
  del(.eventName)
  del(.awsRegion)
  del(.sourceIPAddress)
  del(.userAgent)
  del(.userIdentity)
  del(.requestParameters)
  del(.responseElements)
  del(.errorCode)
  del(.errorMessage)
  del(.requestID)
  del(.eventID)
  del(.eventType)
  del(.eventCategory)
  del(.managementEvent)
  del(.readOnly)
  del(.recipientAccountId)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.cloudtrail_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6001'

[transforms.cloudtrail_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6001'

[transforms.cloudtrail_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudtrail_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/aws-cloudtrail",
    "parser":        "cloudtrail",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "cloudtrail_event_name_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudtrail_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudtrail_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les audit events du `kube-apiserver` (JSON, API `audit.k8s.io/v1`). Normalise en OCSF classe 6003 (API Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Kubernetes Audit Log — JSON (audit.k8s.io/v1)
# OCSF Class : 6003 (API Activity)
# Input      : File (JSON per line, kube-apiserver --audit-log-path)
# Tested with: Kubernetes 1.28 - 1.31, audit policy level >= Metadata
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.k8s_audit_input]
type    = "file"
include = ["${K8S_AUDIT_LOG:-/var/log/kubernetes/audit.log}"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["k8s_audit_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)
  event = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? null
  valid = is_object(event) && (to_string(get(object!(event), ["kind"]) ?? "") ?? "") == "Event"

  if valid {
    ev = object!(event)

    # Helpers : null si champ absent ou string vide (OCSF preferre null a "")
    verb_raw = get(ev, ["verb"]) ?? null
    verb = if verb_raw != null { to_string(verb_raw) ?? "" } else { "" }

    uri_raw = get(ev, ["requestURI"]) ?? null
    request_uri = if uri_raw != null { to_string(uri_raw) ?? "" } else { "" }

    aid_raw = get(ev, ["auditID"]) ?? null
    audit_id = if aid_raw != null { s = to_string(aid_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    stage_raw = get(ev, ["stage"]) ?? null
    stage = if stage_raw != null { s = to_string(stage_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    level_raw = get(ev, ["level"]) ?? null
    level = if level_raw != null { s = to_string(level_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    ua_raw = get(ev, ["userAgent"]) ?? null
    user_agent_str = if ua_raw != null { s = to_string(ua_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # User identity
    user_obj = object(get(ev, ["user"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    un_raw = get(user_obj, ["username"]) ?? null
    user_name = if un_raw != null { s = to_string(un_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    uu_raw = get(user_obj, ["uid"]) ?? null
    user_uid = if uu_raw != null { s = to_string(uu_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # Source IPs (array) : on prend la 1ere
    source_ips = array(get(ev, ["sourceIPs"]) ?? []) ?? []
    src_ip = if length(source_ips) > 0 { s = to_string(source_ips[0]) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # objectRef : cible de l'operation
    obj_ref = object(get(ev, ["objectRef"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    tr_raw = get(obj_ref, ["resource"]) ?? null
    target_resource = if tr_raw != null { s = to_string(tr_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tn_raw = get(obj_ref, ["namespace"]) ?? null
    target_namespace = if tn_raw != null { s = to_string(tn_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tname_raw = get(obj_ref, ["name"]) ?? null
    target_name = if tname_raw != null { s = to_string(tname_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tg_raw = get(obj_ref, ["apiGroup"]) ?? null
    target_api_group = if tg_raw != null { s = to_string(tg_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tv_raw = get(obj_ref, ["apiVersion"]) ?? null
    target_api_version = if tv_raw != null { s = to_string(tv_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # responseStatus : code + message
    resp = object(get(ev, ["responseStatus"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    resp_code = to_int(get(resp, ["code"]) ?? 0) ?? 0
    rr_raw = get(resp, ["reason"]) ?? null
    resp_reason = if rr_raw != null { s = to_string(rr_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # annotations (authorization decision)
    annotations = object(get(ev, ["annotations"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    az_raw = get(annotations, ["authorization.k8s.io/decision"]) ?? null
    authz_decision = if az_raw != null { s = to_string(az_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    is_failure = resp_code >= 400
    status = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    status_id = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_severity = if resp_code >= 500 { 4 } else if resp_code >= 400 { 3 } else { 1 }

    # activity_id OCSF : Create=1, Read=2, Update=3, Delete=4, Other=99
    activity_id = if verb == "create" || verb == "post" { 1 } else if verb == "get" || verb == "list" || verb == "watch" { 2 } else if verb == "update" || verb == "patch" || verb == "put" { 3 } else if verb == "delete" || verb == "deletecollection" { 4 } else { 99 }

    # Timestamp : stageTimestamp priorise (fin de requete)
    ts_str_raw = to_string(get(ev, ["stageTimestamp"]) ?? "") ?? ""
    if ts_str_raw == "" {
      ts_str_raw = to_string(get(ev, ["requestReceivedTimestamp"]) ?? "") ?? ""
    }
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str_raw, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    .class_uid    = 6003
    .category_uid = 6
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .time         = ts
    .status       = status
    .status_id    = status_id

    .api = {
      "operation": verb,
      "service": { "name": "kube-apiserver" },
      "request":  { "uid": audit_id, "uri": request_uri },
      "response": { "code": resp_code, "message": resp_reason }
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": user_name,
        "uid":  user_uid
      }
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": src_ip
    }

    .http_request = {
      "user_agent": user_agent_str
    }

    .resources = [{
      "type":      target_resource,
      "name":      target_name,
      "namespace": target_namespace,
      "group":     target_api_group,
      "version":   target_api_version
    }]

    .cloud = {
      "provider": "Kubernetes"
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Kubernetes",
        "vendor_name": "CNCF"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     audit_id
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "audit_stage":           stage,
      "audit_level":           level,
      "authorization_decision": authz_decision
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.file)
  del(.host)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.k8s_audit_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6003'

# --- TRANSFORM : extraction des echecs pour raw-logs ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["k8s_audit_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/kubernetes-audit",
    "parser":        "k8s_audit",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "kubernetes_audit_json_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["k8s_audit_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-k8s/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["k8s_audit_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalise les evenements Microsoft 365 Unified Audit recuperes par `kolektor-fetcher` via l'Office 365 Management Activity API.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Microsoft 365 Unified Audit — Management Activity API
# OCSF Class : 6001 (API Activity)
# Input      : HTTP push — POST NDJSON sur ${LISTEN_PORT:-8517}
#              Le fetcher poste chaque event JSON sur une ligne distincte.
# ==============================================================================

[sources.microsoft365_audit_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8517}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft365_audit_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  operation = to_string(.Operation) ?? null
  workload   = to_string(.Workload)  ?? null
  valid = operation != null && operation != "" && workload != null && workload != ""

  ts_str    = to_string(.CreationTime) ?? null
  parsed_ts = if ts_str != null {
    parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") ?? null
  } else { null }
  ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

  result     = to_string(.ResultStatus) ?? null
  result_lc  = if result != null { downcase!(result) } else { "" }
  is_failure = result_lc != "" && result_lc != "succeeded" && result_lc != "success" && result_lc != "true"

  user_name = to_string(.UserId)   ?? null
  user_uid  = to_string(.UserKey)  ?? null
  user_type = to_string(.UserType) ?? null
  client_ip = to_string(.ClientIP) ?? null
  event_uid = to_string(.Id)       ?? null

  ocsf_unmapped = {
    "record_type":        .RecordType,
    "object_id":          to_string(.ObjectId)         ?? null,
    "organization_id":    to_string(.OrganizationId)   ?? null,
    "client_info_string": to_string(.ClientInfoString) ?? null,
    "external_access":    .ExternalAccess,
    "user_agent":         to_string(.UserAgent)        ?? null
  }

  . = {
    "class_uid":    if valid { 6001 } else { 0 },
    "category_uid": if valid { 6 } else { 0 },
    "severity_id":  if !valid { 0 } else if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 },
    "time":         ts,
    "status":       if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" },
    "status_id":    if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 },
    "api": {
      "operation": operation,
      "service":   { "name": workload },
      "response":  { "error_message": result }
    },
    "actor": {
      "user": {
        "name": user_name,
        "uid":  user_uid,
        "type": user_type
      }
    },
    "src_endpoint":  { "ip": client_ip },
    "metadata": {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft 365 Unified Audit",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version":      "1.0.0",
      "uid":          event_uid,
      "log_provider": workload
    },
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }
'''

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6001'

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6001'

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft365_audit_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/microsoft-365-audit",
    "parser":        "microsoft-365-audit",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "microsoft365_audit_required_fields_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft365_audit_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft365_audit_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les events CrowdStrike Falcon via le SIEM Connector (JSON syslog). Normalise en OCSF selon le type d'event : - DetectionSummaryEvent → classe 2001 (Security Finding) - ProcessRollup2 → classe 1003 (Process Activity) - NetworkDetection → classe 4001 (Network Activity)
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# CrowdStrike Falcon — JSON syslog (Streaming API / SIEM Connector)
# OCSF Class : 1003 (Process Activity) / 4001 (Network Activity) / 2001 (Detection)
# Input      : Syslog TCP (JSON payload)
# Tested with: CrowdStrike Falcon SIEM Connector, Streaming API v2
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.crowdstrike_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-1514}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = to_string(.message) ?? ""

  # CrowdStrike envoie du JSON dans le champ message syslog
  event = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? {}
  valid = exists(event.metadata)

  if valid {
    meta = object(event.metadata) ?? {}
    event_type = to_string(meta.eventType) ?? ""

    # Classification
    # DetectionSummaryEvent → 2001 (Security Finding)
    # ProcessRollup2 → 1003 (Process Activity)
    # NetworkContainmentEvent / NetworkDetection → 4001 (Network)
    # default → 2001
    is_detection = event_type == "DetectionSummaryEvent" || event_type == "IncidentSummaryEvent"
    is_process = event_type == "ProcessRollup2" || event_type == "SyntheticProcessRollup2"
    is_network = event_type == "NetworkContainmentEvent" || event_type == "NetworkDetection"

    class_uid = if is_process { 1003 } else if is_network { 4001 } else { 2001 }
    category_uid = if is_network { 4 } else if is_process { 1 } else { 2 }

    # Severity : CrowdStrike SeverityName → OCSF severity_id
    cs_severity_name = to_string(event.SeverityName) ?? ""
    ocsf_severity = if cs_severity_name == "Critical" { 5 } else if cs_severity_name == "High" { 4 } else if cs_severity_name == "Medium" { 3 } else if cs_severity_name == "Low" { 2 } else { 1 }

    # Timestamp
    ts_raw = to_int(meta.eventCreationTime) ?? to_int(event.ProcessStartTime) ?? null
    ts = if ts_raw != null { ts_raw } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    .class_uid    = class_uid
    .category_uid = category_uid
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts

    # Use explicit null checks — to_int(null)=0 and to_string(null)="" are infallible,
    # so the ?? fallback never fires when the field is missing.
    proc_name = if event.FileName != null { to_string!(event.FileName) } else if event.ImageFileName != null { to_string!(event.ImageFileName) } else { null }
    proc_pid = if event.TargetProcessId != null { to_int!(event.TargetProcessId) } else if event.ProcessId != null { to_int!(event.ProcessId) } else { null }
    actor_pid = if event.ParentProcessId != null { to_int!(event.ParentProcessId) } else { null }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(event.UserName) ?? null
      },
      "process": {
        "pid":      actor_pid,
        "name":     to_string(event.ParentImageFileName) ?? null,
        "cmd_line": to_string(event.ParentCommandLine) ?? null
      }
    }

    .process = {
      "pid":      proc_pid,
      "name":     proc_name,
      "cmd_line": to_string(event.CommandLine) ?? null,
      "file": {
        "hashes": [
          { "algorithm": "SHA256", "value": to_string(event.SHA256String) ?? null }
        ]
      }
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip":       to_string(event.LocalIP) ?? to_string(event.aip) ?? null,
      "hostname": to_string(event.ComputerName) ?? null
    }

    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip":   to_string(event.RemoteIP) ?? null,
      "port": to_int(event.RemotePort) ?? null
    }

    .finding_info = {
      "title":    to_string(event.DetectName) ?? to_string(event.DetectDescription) ?? null,
      "uid":      to_string(event.DetectId) ?? to_string(meta.eventId) ?? null,
      "types":    [to_string(event.Tactic) ?? ""],
      "analytic": {
        "uid":  to_string(event.Technique) ?? null,
        "name": to_string(event.TechniqueId) ?? null
      }
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "CrowdStrike Falcon",
        "vendor_name": "CrowdStrike"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(meta.eventId) ?? null
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "event_type":   event_type,
      "customer_id":  to_string(meta.customerIDString) ?? null,
      "falcon_host_link": to_string(event.FalconHostLink) ?? null
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = del(.message)
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.crowdstrike_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.crowdstrike_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.crowdstrike_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "endpoint/crowdstrike-falcon",
    "parser":        "crowdstrike-falcon",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "crowdstrike_metadata_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- ROUTE : dispatch par class_uid ---
# 1003 ProcessRollup2 + 2001 DetectionSummary → ocsf-endpoint
# 4001 NetworkDetection/NetworkContainment → ocsf-network
[transforms.crowdstrike_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_filter_valid"]
route.endpoint = '.class_uid == 1001 || .class_uid == 1003 || .class_uid == 2001'
route.network  = '.class_uid == 4001'

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_endpoint]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_route_by_class.endpoint"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_endpoint.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-network ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_network]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_route_by_class.network"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-network/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_network.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalise les logs Microsoft Graph Entra ID produits par `kolektor-fetcher` :
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Microsoft Entra ID — Graph API audit logs
# OCSF Classes : 3002 (Authentication — sign-in) · 6001 (API Activity — directory audit)
# Input        : HTTP push — POST NDJSON sur ${LISTEN_PORT:-8518}
#                Le fetcher poste chaque event JSON sur une ligne distincte.
# ==============================================================================

[sources.microsoft_entra_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8518}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  signin_time        = to_string(.createdDateTime)  ?? null
  audit_time         = to_string(.activityDateTime) ?? null
  is_signin          = signin_time != null && signin_time != ""
  is_directory_audit = audit_time != null && audit_time != ""

  ts_str    = if is_signin { signin_time } else { audit_time }
  parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
  ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

  ocsf_class_uid    = 0
  ocsf_category_uid = 0
  ocsf_severity_id  = 0
  ocsf_status       = "Unknown"
  ocsf_status_id    = 0
  ocsf_actor        = {}
  ocsf_api          = null
  ocsf_app          = null
  ocsf_src_endpoint = {}
  ocsf_metadata     = {}
  ocsf_unmapped     = {}

  if is_signin {
    status_obj     = object(.status) ?? {}
    error_code     = to_int(get(status_obj, ["errorCode"]) ?? 0) ?? 0
    failure_reason = to_string(get(status_obj, ["failureReason"]) ?? null) ?? null
    is_failure     = error_code != 0

    ocsf_class_uid    = 3002
    ocsf_category_uid = 3
    ocsf_severity_id  = if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_status       = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    ocsf_status_id    = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }

    ocsf_actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(.userPrincipalName) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(.userId)            ?? null
      }
    }

    ocsf_app = {
      "name": to_string(.appDisplayName) ?? null,
      "uid":  to_string(.appId)          ?? null
    }

    ocsf_src_endpoint = { "ip": to_string(.ipAddress) ?? null }

    ocsf_metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft Entra ID",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(.id) ?? null
    }

    ocsf_unmapped = {
      "event_family":              "signIn",
      "conditional_access_status": to_string(.conditionalAccessStatus) ?? null,
      "failure_reason":            failure_reason,
      "risk_detail":               to_string(.riskDetail)              ?? null,
      "risk_level_aggregated":     to_string(.riskLevelAggregated)     ?? null,
      "sign_in_event_types":       .signInEventTypes,
      "resource_display_name":     to_string(.resourceDisplayName)     ?? null,
      "service_principal_id":      to_string(.servicePrincipalId)      ?? null,
      "client_app_used":           to_string(.clientAppUsed)           ?? null
    }
  } else if is_directory_audit {
    initiated_by   = object(.initiatedBy) ?? {}
    initiated_user = object(get(initiated_by, ["user"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    initiated_app  = object(get(initiated_by, ["app"])  ?? {}) ?? {}
    result         = to_string(.result) ?? null
    is_failure     = result != null && result != "" && result != "success"

    ocsf_class_uid    = 6001
    ocsf_category_uid = 6
    ocsf_severity_id  = if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_status       = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    ocsf_status_id    = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }

    ocsf_api = {
      "operation": to_string(.activityDisplayName) ?? null,
      "service":   { "name": to_string(.category) ?? "Microsoft Entra ID" },
      "response":  { "error_message": to_string(.resultReason) ?? null }
    }

    ocsf_actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(get(initiated_user, ["userPrincipalName"]) ?? null) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(get(initiated_user, ["id"])                ?? null) ?? null
      },
      "app": {
        "name": to_string(get(initiated_app, ["displayName"]) ?? null) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(get(initiated_app, ["appId"])       ?? null) ?? null
      }
    }

    ocsf_metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft Entra ID",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(.id) ?? null
    }

    ocsf_unmapped = {
      "event_family":       "directoryAudit",
      "logged_by_service":  to_string(.loggedByService) ?? null,
      "target_resources":   .targetResources,
      "additional_details": .additionalDetails,
      "correlation_id":     to_string(.correlationId)   ?? null
    }
  }

  . = {
    "class_uid":     ocsf_class_uid,
    "category_uid":  ocsf_category_uid,
    "severity_id":   ocsf_severity_id,
    "time":          ts,
    "status":        ocsf_status,
    "status_id":     ocsf_status_id,
    "actor":         ocsf_actor,
    "src_endpoint":  ocsf_src_endpoint,
    "metadata":      ocsf_metadata,
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }

  if ocsf_api != null {
    .api = ocsf_api
  }
  if ocsf_app != null {
    .app = ocsf_app
  }
'''

[transforms.microsoft_entra_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3002'
route.audit    = '.class_uid == 6001'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/microsoft-entra",
    "parser":        "microsoft-entra",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "microsoft_entra_event_shape_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_audit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_route_by_class.audit"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_audit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les evenements de securite Windows via Winlogbeat (format JSON). Normalise en OCSF selon le type d'event : - 4624/4625/4648 → classe 3002 (Authentication) - 4720/4732 → classe 3001 (Account Change) - 4688/4698 → classe 1003 (Process Activity)
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Windows Security Event Log (EVTX) — via Winlogbeat JSON
# OCSF Class : 3002 (Authentication) / 3001 (Account Change) / 1003 (Process)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON from Winlogbeat/NXLog)
# Tested with: Windows Server 2019/2022, Winlogbeat 8.x
# Events     : 4624/4625/4648/4688/4698/4720/4732
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.winevtx_input]
type    = "http_server"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8514}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.winevtx_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["winevtx_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Winlogbeat JSON structure :
  # .winlog.event_id, .winlog.event_data.*, .winlog.computer_name, .timestamp
  event_id = to_int(.winlog.event_id) ?? to_int(.event_id) ?? 0
  event_data = object(.winlog.event_data) ?? object(.event_data) ?? {}
  computer = to_string(.winlog.computer_name) ?? to_string(.computer_name) ?? "unknown"

  # Timestamp
  ts_str = to_string(.timestamp) ?? null
  ts = if ts_str != null {
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }
  } else {
    to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Classification par Event ID
  # 4624/4625/4648 = Authentication (3002)
  # 4720/4732 = Account Change (3001)
  # 4688 = Process Activity (1003)
  # 4698 = Scheduled Task (1003)
  is_auth = event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4625 || event_id == 4648
  is_account = event_id == 4720 || event_id == 4732
  is_process = event_id == 4688 || event_id == 4698
  valid = is_auth || is_account || is_process

  class_uid = if is_auth { 3002 } else if is_account { 3001 } else if is_process { 1003 } else { 0 }
  category_uid = if is_process { 1 } else if is_auth || is_account { 3 } else { 0 }

  # Severity
  # 4625 (failed logon), 4648 (explicit creds) = medium
  # 4720 (user created), 4732 (member added to group) = low
  # 4688 (new process), 4698 (scheduled task) = info
  ocsf_severity = if event_id == 4625 { 3 } else if event_id == 4648 || event_id == 4720 || event_id == 4732 { 2 } else { 1 }

  # Status for auth events
  status = if event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4648 { "Success" } else if event_id == 4625 { "Failure" } else { "Other" }
  status_id = if event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4648 { 1 } else if event_id == 4625 { 2 } else { 0 }

  # User info
  target_user = to_string(event_data.TargetUserName) ?? null
  target_domain = to_string(event_data.TargetDomainName) ?? null
  subject_user = to_string(event_data.SubjectUserName) ?? null
  logon_type = to_int(event_data.LogonType) ?? null
  process_name = to_string(event_data.NewProcessName) ?? to_string(event_data.ProcessName) ?? null
  parent_process_name = to_string(event_data.ParentProcessName) ?? null
  command_line = to_string(event_data.CommandLine) ?? null

  .class_uid    = class_uid
  .category_uid = category_uid
  .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
  .time         = ts
  .status       = status
  .status_id    = status_id

  .actor = {
    "user": {
      "name":   subject_user,
      "domain": to_string(event_data.SubjectDomainName) ?? null
    }
  }

  .user = {
    "name":   target_user,
    "domain": target_domain,
    "uid":    to_string(event_data.TargetUserSid) ?? to_string(event_data.TargetSid) ?? null
  }

  .src_endpoint = {
    "ip":       to_string(event_data.IpAddress) ?? null,
    "port":     to_int(event_data.IpPort) ?? null,
    "hostname": computer
  }

  .auth_protocol_id = logon_type

  .process = {
    "name":     process_name,
    "cmd_line": command_line,
    "parent_process": {
      "name": parent_process_name
    }
  }

  .metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Windows Security",
      "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "uid":     to_string(event_id)
  }

  .unmapped = {
    "event_id":        event_id,
    "logon_type":      logon_type,
    "process_name":    process_name,
    "parent_process":  parent_process_name,
    "command_line":    command_line,
    "logon_process":   to_string(event_data.LogonProcessName) ?? null,
    "failure_reason":  to_string(event_data.FailureReason) ?? null,
    "sub_status":      to_string(event_data.SubStatus) ?? null
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.message)
  del(.winlog)
  del(.event_data)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.computer_name)
  del(.event_id)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop unknown events ---
[transforms.winevtx_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["winevtx_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

# --- ROUTE : dispatch par class_uid vers l'index OCSF correspondant ---
[transforms.winevtx_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["winevtx_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3001 || .class_uid == 3002'
route.endpoint = '.class_uid == 1001 || .class_uid == 1003'

[transforms.winevtx_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["winevtx_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.winevtx_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["winevtx_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/windows-security-evtx",
    "parser":        "windows-security-evtx",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "windows_security_event_id_unsupported",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-identity (auth + account) ---
[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["winevtx_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint (process: 4688/4698) ---
[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_endpoint]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["winevtx_route_by_class.endpoint"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_endpoint.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["winevtx_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.winevtx_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les evenements Sysmon via Winlogbeat (format JSON). Normalise en OCSF selon le type d'event : - Event 1 (Process Create), Event 7 (Image Loaded) → classe 1003 - Event 3 (Network Connection) → classe 4001 - Event 11 (File Created) → classe 1001 - Event 22 (DNS Query) → classe 4003
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Windows Sysmon — Events 1/3/7/11/22
# OCSF Class : 1003 (Process Activity) / 4001 (Network Activity) / 1001 (File) / 4003 (DNS)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON from Winlogbeat/NXLog)
# Tested with: Sysmon 15.x, Windows 10/11/Server 2022
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.sysmon_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8515}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.sysmon_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["sysmon_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Sysmon via Winlogbeat : .winlog.event_id + .winlog.event_data.*
  event_id = to_int(.winlog.event_id) ?? to_int(.event_id) ?? 0
  event_data = object(.winlog.event_data) ?? object(.event_data) ?? {}
  computer = to_string(.winlog.computer_name) ?? to_string(.computer_name) ?? "unknown"

  ts_str = to_string(.timestamp) ?? null
  ts = if ts_str != null {
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }
  } else {
    to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Classification :
  # 1  = Process Create → 1003
  # 3  = Network Connection → 4001
  # 7  = Image Loaded → 1003
  # 11 = File Created → 1001
  # 22 = DNS Query → 4003
  is_process = event_id == 1 || event_id == 7
  is_network = event_id == 3
  is_file = event_id == 11
  is_dns = event_id == 22
  valid = is_process || is_network || is_file || is_dns

  class_uid = if is_process { 1003 } else if is_network { 4001 } else if is_file { 1001 } else if is_dns { 4003 } else { 0 }
  category_uid = if is_network || is_dns { 4 } else if is_process || is_file { 1 } else { 0 }

  ocsf_severity = 1

  .class_uid    = class_uid
  .category_uid = category_uid
  .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
  .time         = ts

  # Process info (Event 1 — Process Create)
  .actor = {
    "user": {
      "name": to_string(event_data.User) ?? null
    },
    "process": {
      "pid":          to_int(event_data.ParentProcessId) ?? null,
      "name":         to_string(event_data.ParentImage) ?? null,
      "cmd_line":     to_string(event_data.ParentCommandLine) ?? null
    }
  }

  .process = {
    "pid":          to_int(event_data.ProcessId) ?? null,
    "name":         to_string(event_data.Image) ?? null,
    "cmd_line":     to_string(event_data.CommandLine) ?? null,
    "file": {
      "hashes": [
        { "algorithm": "SHA256", "value": to_string(event_data.Hashes) ?? null }
      ]
    }
  }

  # Network (Event 3)
  .src_endpoint = {
    "ip":       to_string(event_data.SourceIp) ?? null,
    "port":     to_int(event_data.SourcePort) ?? null,
    "hostname": computer
  }

  .dst_endpoint = {
    "ip":       to_string(event_data.DestinationIp) ?? null,
    "port":     to_int(event_data.DestinationPort) ?? null,
    "hostname": to_string(event_data.DestinationHostname) ?? null
  }

  # File (Event 11)
  .file = {
    "name": to_string(event_data.TargetFilename) ?? null
  }

  # DNS (Event 22)
  query_results = to_string(event_data.QueryResults) ?? null
  qtype_match = if query_results != null { parse_regex(query_results, r'type:\s*(?P<type>\d+)') ?? {} } else { {} }
  .query = {
    "hostname": to_string(event_data.QueryName) ?? null,
    "type":     qtype_match.type
  }

  .metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Sysmon",
      "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "uid":     to_string(event_id)
  }

  .unmapped = {
    "event_id":    event_id,
    "rule_name":   to_string(event_data.RuleName) ?? null,
    "guid":        to_string(event_data.ProcessGuid) ?? null,
    "query_results": query_results
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.message)
  del(.winlog)
  del(.event_data)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.computer_name)
  del(.event_id)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.sysmon_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["sysmon_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

# --- ROUTE : dispatch par class_uid ---
[transforms.sysmon_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["sysmon_filter_valid"]
route.endpoint = '.class_uid == 1001 || .class_uid == 1003'
route.network  = '.class_uid == 4001'
route.dns      = '.class_uid == 4003'

[transforms.sysmon_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["sysmon_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.sysmon_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["sysmon_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/windows-sysmon",
    "parser":        "windows-sysmon",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "sysmon_event_id_unsupported",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint ---
[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_endpoint]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["sysmon_route_by_class.endpoint"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_endpoint.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-network ---
[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_network]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["sysmon_route_by_class.network"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-network/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_network.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-dns ---
[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_dns]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["sysmon_route_by_class.dns"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-dns/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_dns.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["sysmon_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.sysmon_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les logs du daemon d'audit Linux (`auditd`). Normalise en OCSF : - SYSCALL/EXECVE/PROCTITLE → classe 1003 (Process Activity) - USER_AUTH/USER_LOGIN/CRED_ACQ → classe 3002 (Authentication)
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Linux auditd — SYSCALL, EXECVE, PROCTITLE, USER_AUTH, USER_LOGIN
# OCSF Class : 1003 (Process Activity) + 3002 (Authentication)
# Input      : Syslog TCP (rsyslog forwarde /var/log/audit/audit.log via imfile)
# Tested with: auditd 3.0+, Linux 5.x/6.x
# rsyslog   : imfile /var/log/audit/audit.log -> omfwd target port LISTEN_PORT TCP
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.auditd_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5143}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.auditd_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["auditd_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Parse auditd key=value format
  # type=SYSCALL msg=audit(1713091425.123:456): arch=c000003e syscall=59 ...
  raw_msg = string!(.message)

  # Extraire le type d'event
  type_match = parse_regex(raw_msg, r'^type=(?P<type>[A-Z_]+)') ?? {}
  audit_type = type_match.type

  # Extraire le timestamp depuis msg=audit(EPOCH.MS:SERIAL)
  ts_match = parse_regex(raw_msg, r'msg=audit\((?P<epoch>\d+)\.(?P<ms>\d+):(?P<serial>\d+)\)') ?? {}
  epoch_s = ts_match.epoch
  epoch_ms_raw = ts_match.ms

  # Calculer le timestamp en millisecondes
  if epoch_s != null {
    .time = to_int!(epoch_s) * 1000 + to_int!(epoch_ms_raw)
  } else {
    .time = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Parse tous les key=value apres le header
  kv_part = replace(raw_msg, r'^type=[A-Z_]+ msg=audit\([^)]+\): ?', "")
  pairs = parse_key_value(kv_part, key_value_delimiter: "=", field_delimiter: " ") ?? {}

  # Determiner la classe OCSF selon le type auditd
  is_auth = audit_type == "USER_AUTH" || audit_type == "USER_LOGIN" || audit_type == "CRED_ACQ" || audit_type == "USER_ACCT"
  is_process = audit_type == "SYSCALL" || audit_type == "EXECVE" || audit_type == "PROCTITLE"
  valid = is_auth || is_process
  class_uid = if is_auth { 3002 } else { 1003 }
  category_uid = if is_auth { 3 } else { 1 }

  # Severity : SYSCALL success=yes → info, success=no → medium
  success = pairs.success
  res = pairs.res
  ocsf_severity = if success == "no" || res == "failed" { 3 } else { 1 }

  if valid {
    .class_uid    = class_uid
    .category_uid = category_uid
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
  }

  # Process info (SYSCALL/EXECVE)
  uid_val = pairs.uid
  auid_val = pairs.auid
  pid_raw = pairs.pid
  pid_val = if pid_raw != null { to_int!(pid_raw) } else { null }
  comm_val = pairs.comm
  proctitle_val = pairs.proctitle

  .actor = {
    "user": {
      "uid":  uid_val,
      "name": auid_val
    },
    "process": {
      "pid":  pid_val,
      "name": comm_val,
      "cmd_line": proctitle_val
    }
  }

  hostname_val = pairs.hostname
  addr_val = pairs.addr

  .src_endpoint = {
    "hostname": hostname_val,
    "ip":       addr_val
  }

  serial_val = ts_match.serial

  .metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Linux auditd",
      "vendor_name": "Linux"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "uid":     serial_val
  }

  syscall_val = pairs.syscall
  arch_val = pairs.arch
  key_val = pairs.key

  .unmapped = {
    "audit_type": audit_type,
    "syscall":    syscall_val,
    "arch":       arch_val,
    "key":        key_val
  }

  # Ligne brute complète (header syslog + contenu auditd) + identifiant unique
  _ts   = to_string(.timestamp) ?? ""
  _host = string(.hostname)     ?? ""
  _app  = string(.appname)      ?? ""
  .raw  = _ts + " " + _host + " " + _app + ": " + raw_msg
  .uid  = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop vides ---
[transforms.auditd_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["auditd_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 1003 || .class_uid == 3002'

# --- ROUTE : dispatch par class_uid (3002 USER_AUTH → identity, 1003 SYSCALL → endpoint) ---
[transforms.auditd_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["auditd_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3002'
route.endpoint = '.class_uid == 1001 || .class_uid == 1003'

[transforms.auditd_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["auditd_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 1003 && .class_uid != 3002'

# --- TRANSFORM : extraction des echecs pour raw-logs ---
[transforms.auditd_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["auditd_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "linux/auditd",
    "parser":        "auditd",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "auditd_type_unsupported",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint (SYSCALL/EXECVE) ---
[sinks.auditd_quickwit_endpoint]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["auditd_route_by_class.endpoint"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.auditd_quickwit_endpoint.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-identity (USER_AUTH/USER_LOGIN/CRED_ACQ/USER_ACCT) ---
[sinks.auditd_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["auditd_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.auditd_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.auditd_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["auditd_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.auditd_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les evenements d'authentification Linux depuis `/var/log/auth.log`. Normalise en OCSF classe 3002 (Authentication).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Linux auth.log — SSH, sudo, PAM authentication events
# OCSF Class : 3002 (Authentication)
# Input      : Syslog TCP (rsyslog forwarde auth,authpriv facility)
# Tested with: OpenSSH 8.x/9.x, sudo 1.9.x, Ubuntu/Debian
# rsyslog   : auth,authpriv.* -> omfwd target port LISTEN_PORT protocol TCP
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.authlog_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5142}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.authlog_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["authlog_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # La source syslog Vector parse le header et fournit :
  # .hostname, .appname, .procid, .timestamp, .message (corps du message uniquement)
  hostname = string(.hostname) ?? ""
  app      = string(.appname) ?? ""
  pid_raw  = .procid
  pid      = if pid_raw != null { to_int!(pid_raw) } else { null }
  msg      = string!(.message)
  raw_msg  = msg

  # Determiner le type d'event et extraire les details depuis le corps du message
  is_ssh_accept = match(msg, r'Accepted\s+(password|publickey)\s+for')
  is_ssh_fail = match(msg, r'Failed\s+(password|publickey)\s+for')
  is_ssh_invalid = match(msg, r'Invalid user')
  is_sudo = app == "sudo" || match(msg, r'sudo:')
  is_pam = match(msg, r'pam_unix\(')
  valid = is_ssh_accept || is_ssh_fail || is_ssh_invalid || is_sudo || is_pam

  # SSH accepted: "Accepted publickey for user from 1.2.3.4 port 54321 ssh2"
  ssh_accept = parse_regex(msg, r'Accepted\s+(?P<method>\S+)\s+for\s+(?P<user>\S+)\s+from\s+(?P<ip>\S+)\s+port\s+(?P<port>\d+)') ?? {}

  # SSH failed: "Failed password for user from 1.2.3.4 port 54321 ssh2"
  # SSH failed invalid: "Failed password for invalid user admin from 1.2.3.4 port 54321 ssh2"
  ssh_fail = parse_regex(msg, r'Failed\s+(?P<method>\S+)\s+for\s+(?:invalid user\s+)?(?P<user>\S+)\s+from\s+(?P<ip>\S+)\s+port\s+(?P<port>\d+)') ?? {}

  # sudo: "user : TTY=pts/0 ; PWD=/home/user ; USER=root ; COMMAND=/usr/bin/apt update"
  sudo_match = parse_regex(msg, r'(?P<user>\S+)\s+:\s+TTY=(?P<tty>\S+)\s+;\s+PWD=(?P<pwd>\S+)\s+;\s+USER=(?P<target_user>\S+)\s+;\s+COMMAND=(?P<command>.+)$') ?? {}

  # Construire les champs en fonction du type (ssh_fail/sudo_match si ssh_accept vide).
  # En VRL, `??` fallback uniquement sur *erreur* d'expression fallible, pas sur `null`
  # (une valeur null est "infaillible") — ici les captures regex retournent null => cascade explicite.
  user_name = if ssh_accept.user != null { ssh_accept.user } else if ssh_fail.user != null { ssh_fail.user } else if sudo_match.user != null { sudo_match.user } else { null }
  src_ip = if ssh_accept.ip != null { ssh_accept.ip } else if ssh_fail.ip != null { ssh_fail.ip } else { null }
  src_port_raw = if ssh_accept.port != null { ssh_accept.port } else if ssh_fail.port != null { ssh_fail.port } else { null }
  src_port = if src_port_raw != null { to_int!(src_port_raw) } else { null }
  auth_method = if ssh_accept.method != null { ssh_accept.method } else if ssh_fail.method != null { ssh_fail.method } else { null }

  # Severity et status
  is_success = is_ssh_accept || (is_sudo && !match(msg, r'authentication failure'))
  is_failure = is_ssh_fail || is_ssh_invalid || match(msg, r'authentication failure')
  ocsf_severity = if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }

  status = if is_success { "Success" } else if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Other" }
  status_id = if is_success { 1 } else if is_failure { 2 } else { 0 }

  activity = if is_ssh_accept || is_ssh_fail || is_ssh_invalid { "Logon" } else if is_sudo { "Privilege Escalation" } else { "Other" }
  activity_id = if is_ssh_accept || is_ssh_fail || is_ssh_invalid { 1 } else if is_sudo { 5 } else { 0 }

  if valid {
    .class_uid     = 3002
    .category_uid  = 3
    .severity_id   = ocsf_severity
    .status        = status
    .status_id     = status_id
    .activity_name = activity
    .activity_id   = activity_id
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
  }
  .time = to_unix_timestamp(.timestamp, unit: "milliseconds") ?? to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  .actor = {
    "user": {
      "name": user_name
    },
    "process": {
      "name": app,
      "pid":  pid
    }
  }

  .src_endpoint = {
    "ip":       src_ip,
    "port":     src_port,
    "hostname": hostname
  }

  .auth_protocol = auth_method

  .metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Linux auth.log",
      "vendor_name": "Linux"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0"
  }

  sudo_cmd = sudo_match.command
  sudo_target = sudo_match.target_user

  .unmapped = {
    "sudo_command":     sudo_cmd,
    "sudo_target_user": sudo_target
  }

  # Ligne brute complète (header syslog + message) + identifiant unique
  _pid = if pid_raw != null { "[" + to_string!(pid_raw) + "]" } else { "" }
  _ts  = to_string(.timestamp) ?? ""
  .raw = _ts + " " + hostname + " " + app + _pid + ": " + raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop vides ---
[transforms.authlog_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["authlog_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 3002'

[transforms.authlog_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["authlog_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 3002'

# --- TRANSFORM : extraction des echecs pour raw-logs ---
[transforms.authlog_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["authlog_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "linux/auth-log",
    "parser":        "auth-log",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "auth_log_pattern_unmatched",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.authlog_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["authlog_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.authlog_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.authlog_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["authlog_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.authlog_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les logs syslog Linux (rsyslog, syslog-ng, systemd-journald) via TCP/UDP. Normalise en OCSF classe 6001 (API Activity) pour les evenements systeme generiques.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Linux Syslog — RFC 3164 / RFC 5424
# OCSF Class : 6001 (API Activity) — generic system event
# Input      : Syslog TCP/UDP
# Tested with: rsyslog, syslog-ng, systemd-journald
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.syslog_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5141}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.syslog_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["syslog_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # La source syslog de Vector parse automatiquement :
  # .timestamp, .hostname, .appname, .facility, .severity, .message
  # On normalise en OCSF

  # .severity peut être un entier (RFC 3164) ou un string (RFC 5424 via rsyslog).
  # Noms RFC 5424 : emerg/alert/crit/err/warning/notice/info/debug (+ synonymes communs).
  sev_raw = .severity
  sev = if is_integer(sev_raw) {
    to_int!(sev_raw)
  } else {
    s = downcase(to_string(sev_raw) ?? "info")
    if s == "emerg" || s == "emergency" || s == "panic" { 0 } else if s == "alert" { 1 } else if s == "crit" || s == "critical" { 2 } else if s == "err" || s == "error" { 3 } else if s == "warning" || s == "warn" { 4 } else if s == "notice" { 5 } else if s == "info" || s == "informational" { 6 } else if s == "debug" { 7 } else { 6 }
  }
  ocsf_severity = if sev <= 2 { 5 } else if sev <= 3 { 4 } else if sev <= 4 { 3 } else if sev <= 5 { 2 } else { 1 }

  appname = .appname
  hostname = .hostname
  facility = .facility
  procid_val = .procid
  procid_int = if procid_val != null { to_int!(procid_val) } else { null }

  .class_uid    = 6001
  .category_uid = 6
  .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
  .time         = to_unix_timestamp(.timestamp, unit: "milliseconds") ?? to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  .api = {
    "operation": appname,
    "service": { "name": "syslog" }
  }

  .actor = {
    "process": {
      "name": appname,
      "pid":  procid_int
    }
  }

  .src_endpoint = {
    "hostname": hostname
  }

  .metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Linux Syslog",
      "vendor_name": "Linux"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "log_provider": facility
  }

  # Ligne brute complète (header syslog + message) + identifiant unique
  _ts  = to_string(.timestamp) ?? ""
  _pid = if procid_val != null { "[" + to_string!(procid_val) + "]" } else { "" }
  _msg = to_string(.message)   ?? ""
  .raw = _ts + " " + (string(.hostname) ?? "") + " " + (string(.appname) ?? "") + _pid + ": " + _msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  # Nettoyer les champs syslog natifs
  del(.message)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop vides ---
[transforms.syslog_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["syslog_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6001 && .raw != null && .raw != ""'

[transforms.syslog_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["syslog_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6001 || .raw == null || .raw == ""'

# --- TRANSFORM : extraction des echecs pour raw-logs ---
[transforms.syslog_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["syslog_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "linux/syslog",
    "parser":        "syslog",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "syslog_empty_raw",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.syslog_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["syslog_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.syslog_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.syslog_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["syslog_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.syslog_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les logs FortiGate (format key=value) via syslog. Normalise en OCSF classe 4001 (Network Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Fortinet FortiGate — traffic/utm logs (key=value format)
# OCSF Class : 4001 (Network Activity)
# Input      : Syslog TCP/UDP
# Tested with: FortiOS 7.2.x / 7.4.x
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.fortigate_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5144}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.fortigate_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["fortigate_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)

  # FortiGate log format : key=value key="quoted value" ...
  # date=2024-04-14 time=10:23:45 devname="FG100F" devid="FG100FXXXXXXXXXX"
  # logid="0000000013" type="traffic" subtype="forward" level="notice"
  # srcip=10.0.0.5 srcport=54321 dstip=8.8.8.8 dstport=443 ...
  kv = parse_key_value(raw_msg, key_value_delimiter: "=", field_delimiter: " ") ?? {}

  fgt_type = kv.type
  fgt_subtype = kv.subtype
  fgt_action = kv.action
  fgt_level = kv.level

  # Valider qu'on a bien un log FortiGate (null != "" est true en VRL, utiliser is_string)
  valid = is_string(fgt_type) && fgt_type != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : priorite au header syslog (timezone fiable du daemon).
    # Le payload FortiGate "date=... time=..." n'embarque pas de TZ — le device
    # envoie en heure locale et supposer UTC decale l'horloge.
    .time = to_unix_timestamp(.timestamp, unit: "milliseconds") ?? to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

    # Action OCSF
    ocsf_action = if fgt_action == "accept" || fgt_action == "allow" || fgt_action == "passthrough" {
      "Allow"
    } else if fgt_action == "deny" || fgt_action == "drop" || fgt_action == "blocked" {
      "Deny"
    } else if fgt_action == "close" || fgt_action == "timeout" {
      "Close"
    } else {
      "Other"
    }
    ocsf_action_id = if ocsf_action == "Allow" { 1 } else if ocsf_action == "Deny" { 2 } else if ocsf_action == "Close" { 3 } else { 0 }

    # Severity mapping : emergency/alert/critical → 5, error → 4, warning → 3, notice → 2, info → 1
    ocsf_severity = if fgt_level == "emergency" || fgt_level == "alert" || fgt_level == "critical" {
      5
    } else if fgt_level == "error" {
      4
    } else if fgt_level == "warning" {
      3
    } else if fgt_level == "notice" {
      2
    } else {
      1
    }

    .class_uid    = 4001
    .category_uid = 4
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .action       = ocsf_action
    .action_id    = ocsf_action_id

    srcip = kv.srcip
    srcport_raw = kv.srcport
    srcport = if srcport_raw != null { to_int!(srcport_raw) } else { null }
    dstip = kv.dstip
    dstport_raw = kv.dstport
    dstport = if dstport_raw != null { to_int!(dstport_raw) } else { null }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip":   srcip,
      "port": srcport
    }
    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip":   dstip,
      "port": dstport
    }

    proto_raw = kv.proto
    proto_num = if proto_raw != null { to_int!(proto_raw) } else { null }
    service_name = kv.service
    direction_val = kv.direction

    .connection_info = {
      "protocol_num": proto_num,
      "protocol_name": service_name,
      "direction":     direction_val
    }

    rcvdbyte_raw = kv.rcvdbyte
    sentbyte_raw = kv.sentbyte
    rcvdpkt_raw = kv.rcvdpkt
    sentpkt_raw = kv.sentpkt
    bytes_in = if rcvdbyte_raw != null { to_int!(rcvdbyte_raw) } else { null }
    bytes_out = if sentbyte_raw != null { to_int!(sentbyte_raw) } else { null }
    packets_in = if rcvdpkt_raw != null { to_int!(rcvdpkt_raw) } else { null }
    packets_out = if sentpkt_raw != null { to_int!(sentpkt_raw) } else { null }

    .traffic = {
      "bytes_in":    bytes_in,
      "bytes_out":   bytes_out,
      "packets_in":  packets_in,
      "packets_out": packets_out
    }

    logid_val = kv.logid

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "FortiGate",
        "vendor_name": "Fortinet"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     logid_val
    }

    policyid_val = kv.policyid
    devname_val = kv.devname
    srcintf_val = kv.srcintf
    dstintf_val = kv.dstintf
    duration_raw = kv.duration
    duration_val = if duration_raw != null { to_int!(duration_raw) } else { null }
    appcat_val = kv.appcat
    app_val = kv.app

    .unmapped = {
      "type":     fgt_type,
      "subtype":  fgt_subtype,
      "policyid": policyid_val,
      "devname":  devname_val,
      "srcintf":  srcintf_val,
      "dstintf":  dstintf_val,
      "duration": duration_val,
      "appcat":   appcat_val,
      "app":      app_val
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = del(.message)
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.fortigate_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["fortigate_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 4001'

[transforms.fortigate_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["fortigate_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 4001'

[transforms.fortigate_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["fortigate_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "network/fortinet-fortigate",
    "parser":        "fortigate",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "fortigate_key_value_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.fortigate_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["fortigate_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-network/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.fortigate_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.fortigate_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["fortigate_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.fortigate_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les logs filterlog d'OPNsense via syslog. Normalise en OCSF classe 4001 (Network Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# OPNsense Firewall — filterlog
# OCSF Class : 4001 (Network Activity)
# Input      : Syslog TCP/UDP
# Tested with: OPNsense 24.x/25.x
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.opnsense_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5140}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.opnsense_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["opnsense_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)

  # filterlog CSV format (OPNsense / pfSense) — le layout differe par famille IP :
  # 0=rulenr, 1=subrulenr, 2=anchorname, 3=label, 4=interface, 5=reason, 6=action,
  # 7=direction, 8=ip_version
  # IPv4 (ip_version=4) :
  #   9=tos, 10=ecn, 11=ttl, 12=id, 13=offset, 14=flags,
  #   15=proto_id, 16=proto, 17=length, 18=src_ip, 19=dst_ip
  #   TCP/UDP: 20=src_port, 21=dst_port
  # IPv6 (ip_version=6) :
  #   9=class, 10=flow-label, 11=hop_limit, 12=proto, 13=proto_id, 14=length,
  #   15=src_ip, 16=dst_ip
  #   TCP/UDP: 17=src_port, 18=dst_port

  fields = split(raw_msg, ",")
  field_count = length(fields)

  # Besoin d'au moins 17 champs (cas IPv6 ICMPv6 sans port : 17 suffisent)
  valid = field_count >= 17

  if valid {
    action_raw = fields[6]
    direction = fields[7]
    ip_version = fields[8]
    interface = fields[4]

    is_v6 = ip_version == "6"
    # VRL : array indexing n'accepte que des literals ; on branche donc sur is_v6.
    proto_num_raw = if is_v6 { fields[13] } else { fields[15] }
    proto = if is_v6 { fields[12] } else { fields[16] }
    src_ip = if is_v6 { fields[15] } else { fields[18] }
    dst_ip = if is_v6 { fields[16] } else { fields[19] }
    src_port_str = if is_v6 {
      if field_count > 17 { fields[17] } else { "" }
    } else {
      if field_count > 20 { fields[20] } else { "" }
    }
    dst_port_str = if is_v6 {
      if field_count > 18 { fields[18] } else { "" }
    } else {
      if field_count > 21 { fields[21] } else { "" }
    }

    src_port = if src_port_str != "" { to_int(src_port_str) ?? null } else { null }
    dst_port = if dst_port_str != "" { to_int(dst_port_str) ?? null } else { null }
    proto_num = if proto_num_raw != null { to_int(proto_num_raw) ?? null } else { null }

    ocsf_action = if action_raw == "pass" { "Allow" } else { "Deny" }
    ocsf_action_id = if action_raw == "pass" { 1 } else { 2 }
    ocsf_severity = if action_raw == "pass" { 1 } else { 2 }

    .class_uid    = 4001
    .category_uid = 4
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(.timestamp, unit: "milliseconds") ?? to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
    .action       = ocsf_action
    .action_id    = ocsf_action_id

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip":   src_ip,
      "port": src_port
    }
    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip":   dst_ip,
      "port": dst_port
    }
    .connection_info = {
      "protocol_num": proto_num,
      "protocol_name": proto,
      "direction":     direction
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "OPNsense",
        "vendor_name": "OPNsense Project"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }

    rule_nr = fields[0]

    .unmapped = {
      "interface":  interface,
      "rule_nr":    rule_nr,
      "ip_version": ip_version
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Ligne brute complète (header syslog + CSV filterlog) + identifiant unique
  _ts   = to_string(.timestamp) ?? ""
  _host = string(.hostname)     ?? ""
  _app  = string(.appname)      ?? ""
